---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: pranavathiyani
---

## Summary
A clear, one-line description of the feature.

## Motivation
Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed solution
How should it work? Include mockups or examples if possible.

## Data requirements
Does this need new data sources, new ARGs, or changes to `graph.json`?

## Alternatives considered
Any alternative approaches you've thought of.

## Additional context
Links to relevant papers, tools, or databases.
